executives.name: Alan Boeckmann
executives.background: Mr. Boeckmann has served as a member of our Board since May 2022. He is the former Executive Chairman and CEO of Fluor Corporation.

executives.name: Bethany Mayer
executives.background: Ms. Mayer has been a director since 2019. She was President and CEO of Ixia.

executives.name: Carlos Ruiz Sacristan
executives.background: Director since 2004. Chairman of the Board of Sempra Infrastructure and former Secretary of Communications and Transportation of Mexico.

executives.name: Debra Reed-Klages
executives.background: Former Executive Chairman, President and CEO of Sempra Energy.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Donald Felsinger
executives.background: Former Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Sempra Energy. Lead Independent Director of Northrop Grumman.

executives.name: Joseph Householder
executives.background: Former President and COO of Sempra Energy. Director since 2014.

executives.name: Martha Wyrsch
executives.background: Ms. Wyrsch was formerly the General Counsel of Sempra Energy. She has extensive legal and regulatory experience in the energy sector.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Counsel
